scope: dotnet test Concordant.slnx --framework net8.0 --collect:XPlat Code Coverage (cobertura)
notes: Initial beta.2 release-hardening baseline from a local Release/net8.0 test run. The CI floor is set ~6 percentage points below the measured aggregate to absorb collector/runner noise. Raise the floor as coverage improves; do not lower it without an explicit baseline update.
